---
title: "Kai Cooper's Intuition"
search: false
listing:
  sort: "date desc"
  feed:
    title: "Kai Cooper's Intuition"
    description: "Notes, essays, and posts from Kai Cooper"
    items: 30
    type: partial
    language: en
  contents:
    - "intuition/**/index.qmd"
    - "!intuition/index.qmd"
---
